title: VanillaOrIsIt
description: Mainly aims to optimize Performance and the Vanilla feeling.
body:
This Modpack offers a comprehensive optimization and enhancement of Minecraft for an impressive gaming experience. It combines performance-boosting mods, visual improvements, new gameplay features, and practical tools to elevate your game to the next level. Whether you're aiming for better performance, upgrading your game's visuals, or trying out new features, this modpack has something for everyone.

Performance Optimization and APIs

These mods ensure that Minecraft runs more smoothly and efficiently. They enhance game performance and provide necessary interfaces that other mods need to function correctly.

[Athena](https://modrinth.com/mod/athena-ctm)

[CICADA](https://modrinth.com/mod/cicada)

[Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)

[Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)

[Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)

[Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin)

[Architectury API](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api)

[Cardinal Components API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cardinal-components-api)

[Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)

[CreativeCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/creativecore)

[Indium](https://modrinth.com/mod/indium)

[Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium)

[Satin API](https://modrinth.com/mod/satin-api)

[Resourceful Lib](https://modrinth.com/mod/resourceful-lib)

[YetAnotherConfigLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl)

[TCDCommons API](https://modrinth.com/mod/tcdcommons)

[Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)

[Sodium Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra)

[Reese's Sodium Options](https://modrinth.com/mod/reeses-sodium-options)

Graphics and Shaders

Focused on the visual aspect of the game, these mods improve graphics, add shaders, and deliver stunning visuals.

[BSL Shader](https://modrinth.com/shader/bsl-shaders)

[Bliss Shaders](https://modrinth.com/shader/bliss-shader)

[Complementary Shaders - Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined)

[Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris)

[Photon Shader](https://modrinth.com/shader/photon-shader)

[Distant Horizons](https://modrinth.com/mod/distanthorizons)

[3D Skin Layers](https://modrinth.com/mod/3dskinlayers)

Audio Enhancements

This category of mods enhances the sound experience in Minecraft, providing a more immersive audio environment.

[AmbientSounds](https://modrinth.com/mod/ambientsounds)

[Sound Physics Remastered](https://modrinth.com/mod/sound-physics-remastered)

User Interface and HUD

These mods optimize the user interface (GUI) and HUD to make them more user-friendly and visually appealing.

[BetterF3](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterf3)

[Better Statistic Screen](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-stats)

[Better Third Person](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-third-person)

[Smooth GUI](https://modrinth.com/mod/smooth-gui)

[Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)

[Logical Zoom](https://modrinth.com/mod/logical-zoom)

Animations and Visual Effects

These mods introduce new animations or improve existing ones to create a smoother and more natural gameplay experience.

[Eating Animations](https://modrinth.com/mod/eating-animation)

[Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations)

[Fresh Animations - Extensions](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations-extensions)

Gameplay Enhancements and New Features

Mods in this category expand the gameplay with new mechanics, features, and cosmetic additions.

[Assorted Allays](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/assorted-allays)

[Do a Barrel Roll](https://modrinth.com/mod/do-a-barrel-roll)

[Elytra Trinket](https://modrinth.com/mod/elytra_trinket)

[Handcrafted](https://modrinth.com/mod/handcrafted)

[item placer](https://modrinth.com/mod/item-placer)

[Lighty](https://modrinth.com/mod/lighty)

[Sit!](https://modrinth.com/mod/sit!)

[Trinkets](https://modrinth.com/mod/trinkets)

[Wakes](https://modrinth.com/mod/wakes)

[YDM's Weapon Master](https://modrinth.com/mod/weaponmaster)

World and Map Modifications

These mods add practical map and minimap features, making exploration and navigation easier.

[Xaero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap)

[Xaero's World Map](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map)

Resource Management and Tools

These mods improve resource management and item handling.

[AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin)

[Roughly Enough Items (REI)](https://modrinth.com/mod/rei)

[Calculator Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/calculator-mod)

Cosmetic Modifications

This category includes mods focused on visual customization and cosmetics.

[Armor of the Ages](https://modrinth.com/mod/armor-of-the-ages)

[Capes](https://modrinth.com/mod/capes)

With this modpack, you can experience Minecraft in a whole new way – offering a harmonious balance between performance, aesthetics, and gameplay fun.





The Modpack definitly needs more RAM than the 2GB that Minecraft normally runs on.
Probably you need atleast 6GB dedicated to Minecraft, with 8GB it runs perfectly.


Also: If you have a low budged PC you probably will need to lower the LOD's in Distant Horizons or even disable it entirely.
